|release date=[[September]] [[1997]]<ref name="Date">While the credits for [[Star Wars Insider 35|''Star Wars Insider'' 35]] list a Winter [[1997]] publication date, "The Editor's Desk" welcome in [[Star Wars Insider 34|''Star Wars Insider'' 34]] confirms that issue 35 was published in [[September]] 1997. The issue 35 feature article "[[The Jedi Sandstorm]]" and the advertisement on the inside back cover further confirm that issue 35 was published after the release of the book ''[[Star Wars: The Annotated Screenplays]]'', which Amazon [https://www.amazon.com/Star-Wars-Screenplays-Laurent-Bouzereau/dp/0345409817 dates] to [[September 8]], 1997.</ref>

'''''Star Wars Insider'' 35''' is the thirty-fifth issue of ''[[Star Wars Insider]]'' magazine and was the first published by [[Fantastic Media]] It was released in [[September]] [[1997]]. Starting with issue 35, ''Star Wars Insider'' began bimonthly publication. Issue 35 was also the first ''Star Wars Insider'' issue to offer multiple cover variants to readers: a newsstand version featuring a [[Tusken Raider/Legends|Tusken Raider]] and a subscriber-exclusive version featuring a [[Imperial Starfighter Pilot|TIE fighter pilot]].

==Contents==
===Departments===
*"The Editor's Desk" by Jon Bradley Snyder
*"[[Rebel Rumblings]]"
*"[[Prequel Update]]" – Episode I Principal Photography {{C|by Dan Madsen with [[Rick McCallum]]}}
*"[[Prequel Profile]]: Chris Cypert" {{C|by [[Pamela Roller]]}}
*"[[Star News]]"
*"[[In the Star Wars Universe|In the ''Star Wars'' Universe: Kenneth Colley]]" {{C|by [[Scott Chernoff]]}}
*"[[The Jawa Trader|Jawa Trader]]"
*"[[The Horse's Mouth|Straight from the Horse's Mouth]]" – New Comics for '98 {{C|by [[Bob Cooper]]}}
*"[[Scouting the Galaxy]]" – ¿What the Cut Biggs Scene and Mexico Have to Do with Finding Neat Stuff? {{C|by [[Stephen J. Sansweet]]}}

===Features===
*"[[The Magic of Myth: Star Wars comes to the Smithsonian|The Magic of Myth: ''Star Wars'' comes to the Smithsonian]]" {{C|by [[Melissa J. Perenson]]}}
*:<small>Melissa J. Perensen previews the new ''Star Wars'' exhibition in Washington, D.C.</small>
*"[[Let the Wookiee Win: Chewbacca's Lifetime Achievement Award]]" {{C|by [[Athena Yvette Portillo|Athena Portillo]]}}
*:<small>MTV lets the Wookiee win and the ''Insider''{{'s}} Athena Portillo was on the scene.</small>
*"[[The Farce is Back]]"
*:<small>One of the all-time great movie parodies returns: Scott Chernoff finds out what's so special about it.</small>
*"[[Anchorhead: The Lost Scenes]]" {{C|by [[David West Reynolds (real person)|David West Reynolds]]}}
*:<small>David West Reynolds, the "archaeologist of ''Star Wars''", has the full story on the Lost Scenes of Biggs Darklighter</small>
*"[[The Jedi Sandstorm|The ''Jedi'' Sandstorm]]" {{C|by [[David Oghia]]}}
*:<small>David Oghia, of the French Lucasfilm magazine, checks out the deleted scene.</small>
*"[[Making Special Edition Collectibles]]"
*:<small>The ''Insider'' speaks with Eric Larson, the designer who brough many of Pepsi's Special Edition Promotions to life.</small>
